name: AI Brain → NotebookLM synchronization
summary: AI Brain → NotebookLM synchronization is a deferred research hypothesis and must not be presented as implemented, deployed, or live-validated behavior.
status_confidence: High for the deferred classification and credential-free evidence boundary; live product feasibility remains unknown.
user_problem: The owner wants newly eligible AI Brain knowledge available in one NotebookLM notebook without duplicate, stale, unsafe, or misleading publication.
target_users: Single AI Brain owner with an applicable supported NotebookLM edition; current edition and entitlement are unknown.
user_facing_behavior: No current product journey. Research distinguishes a possible Enterprise direct lane from a separately named consumer/Workspace Drive publishing bridge.
functional_coverage: Public research, focused code/Wiki audit, source/capacity/security analysis, three independent PM memos, and 46/46 credential-free local checks only.
scope_boundaries: Not implemented. Gate 0, live Google auth/provider behavior, aggregate composition, publication finality, citation quality, secure token custody, capacity/retention, and exact cleanup remain open.
code_evidence: Current-main adjacent substrate only: item/ZIP Markdown exports, SQLite job patterns, Recall request/execution/run orchestration, safe status projection, and provider abstractions.
test_evidence: The research-only synthetic mapper and durable fake-provider harness pass 46/46 checks; no Google call, live source, credential, or production item was tested.
documentation_evidence: NotebookLM-Synchronization-Research; docs/feature-council/notebooklm-sync research, spikes, security review, council v2, and adversarial reviews.
routes_components_services: No current route, component, API, adapter, worker, schedule, or Settings control implements this capability.
data_and_schemas: No production outbound outbox, target ledger, source mapping, content version, delete tombstone, or Google credential record exists.
flags_and_configuration: No current flag or configuration activates NotebookLM publication or synchronization.
dependencies_and_integrations: Would require a supported edition/API lane, official least-privilege auth, secure mutable credential store, bound private target, durable outbound state, aggregation, observability, retention, privacy consent, and cleanup.
known_limitations: Consumer/Workspace refresh is unobservable by AI Brain; Enterprise is separate licensed Preview/Pre-GA v1alpha; one-source-per-item is capacity-infeasible; initial scope excludes history, edits, deletes, and private attached notes.
